'''Zolanders''' were the native species of [[Zolan/Legends|Zolan]]. They were adapted to the extreme cold of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. As their sun's radioactive emissions increased, the Zolanders created a skin-altering gene, inadvertently creating a genetic offshoot of the Zolanders, the [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]]. After the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the [[Zolan Civil War]] broke out between the two species, and the Zolanders became dominated by the Clawdite, whom they previously treated as a lesser species.
